title: Civilization Motherboard 架构落地
description: 实现 TRAE 主板架构 v2，建立 TRAE = Execution Substrate, NOT Civilization Authority 的权限模型。目标不是添加新功能，而是从权限层面确保所有文明资产变更必须经过 Admission Gate，不存在旁路。
identity_definition: TRAE = Execution Substrate, NOT Civilization Authority
core_principle: TRAE Non-Authority Principle: TRAE = Execution Substrate, NOT Civilization Authority. 主板 = 生命周期接口稳定，解释能力可替换。稳定：Input Contract / Evidence Contract / Candidate Contract / Admission Contract。可替换：Parser / LLM / Miner / Mapping Rule
architecture_flow: External World → Input Adapter → Raw Evidence → Interpretation DAG → Pseudocode Sandbox → Candidate Registry → Admission Gate → Civilization Repository
deliverables: TRAE 权限边界：代码层面确保 TRAE 模块无任何直接写 Repository/Principle/Protocol/Identity 的能力
Raw Evidence 层：evidence_id / source / location / raw_content / captured_at
Interpretation DAG：Document Split → Structure Detection → Concept Extraction → Relation Extraction → Evidence Binding，五节点固定流程，每节点输出必须绑定回 Raw Evidence
Pseudocode Sandbox：输出必须结构化 JSON，禁止自然语言判断句；confidence 需注明计算依据，标注为 Bootstrap 版本待校准
Candidate Registry：candidate_id / source / type / evidence_refs / confidence / status / created_at，预留多来源接入位
Lineage 强制绑定：每个 Candidate 必须有完整 Origin Chain，复用现有 lineage_index.json
acceptance_criteria: TRAE 模块经代码审查确认无任何 Repository 直接写权限
跑通一次完整链路：外部文档 → Raw Evidence → Interpretation DAG → Sandbox → Candidate Registry，产出至少一条完整 Origin Chain 可查
Sandbox 输出全部为结构化 JSON，无自然语言判断句
confidence 计算方法有说明，标注为待校准
forbidden_rules: ❌ 给 TRAE 任何形式的 Repository/Principle/Protocol/Identity 直接写权限
❌ Sandbox 输出自然语言判断，必须结构化
❌ 把 confidence 数值当作精确值使用而不注明计算依据
confidence_note: confidence 数值（如 0.65、0.82）为 Bootstrap 占位初始值，基于证据数量/一致性程度的简单加权计算，需后续真实数据校准。本次交付计算方法说明，不承诺数值精度。

distillation_target.kernel: Civilization Motherboard Kernel（权限边界 + 证据绑定 + 确定性输出）
distillation_target.blueprint: External → Input → Evidence → Interpretation DAG → Sandbox → Candidate → Admission → Repository
distillation_target.constraint: TRAE Non-Authority Principle；所有文明资产变更必须经 Admission Gate
distillation_target.experience: 哪类 Interpretation DAG 节点准确率最高，哪些映射规则容易产生低置信度 Candidate
distillation_target.identity: Civilization Motherboard = Execution Substrate, NOT Civilization Authority

existing_assets.admission_gate: civilization_contract.py 可复用为准入闸门
existing_assets.lineage: lineage_index.json 可复用为 Origin Chain 基础设施
existing_assets.dag_parser: 现有 DAG Parser 可改造为 Interpretation DAG
existing_assets.evidence_layer: law_discovery.py 的 Evidence 体系可扩展复用

title: Law Discovery Protocol
description: 实现 Law Discovery Engine，建立基于 Evidence 的规律发现能力。目标不是优化荐股因子，而是让系统能够持续发现、验证、治理规律，并通过治理后的 Policy 持续提升 Recommendation Engine。
dispatch_note: Self-dispatched prototype. NOT formally dispatched. Running under daily self-audit guardrail. Output limited to Law Registry only — no Runtime/Policy modifications.
principles: Evidence First: 任何规律必须来自 Evidence，不得人为指定规律
Pattern ≠ Law: Pattern 只是重复现象，Law 必须经过 Validation
Law ≠ Policy: 规律不是策略，一个 Law 可以生成多个 Policy
Learning Cannot Modify Recommendation: Learning 永远不能直接修改 Recommendation Engine
Admission Is The Only Gate: 任何 Policy 更新必须经过 Roundtable → Admission → Policy Update
Evidence Immutable: Evidence 不允许修改，只能追加
Law Evolves: Law 可以新增、强化、弱化、废弃，不能静态永久存在
deliverables: Law Discovery Engine (Evidence → Pattern → Hypothesis → Law → Policy Candidate)
definition_of_done: 能从历史 Evidence 自动发现重复 Pattern
Admission 可以批准或拒绝 Policy
Runtime 只能加载 Approved Policy
Policy 支持版本、审计、回滚
Recommendation Engine 无任何直接修改入口

distillation_target.kernel: Law Discovery Kernel（规律发现内核）
distillation_target.blueprint: Evidence → Pattern → Hypothesis → Law → Policy 的演化蓝图
distillation_target.constraint: Learning 不得直接修改 Recommendation Engine；Law 不得绕过治理链直接成为 Policy
distillation_target.experience: 哪类 Pattern 容易形成稳定 Law，哪些 Hypothesis 经常被证据否定
distillation_target.identity: Law Discovery Engine = Evidence-Driven Law Discovery System

existing_assets.performance_tracker: 已有推荐记录和收益跟踪，可作为 Evidence 数据源
existing_assets.publication_gate: 可复用为 Policy 准入闸门
existing_assets.roundtable: red_blue_audit.py 可复用为评估机制
existing_assets.admission_engine: civilization_contract.py 可扩展为策略准入
